targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM ipaddresses
WHERE 1=1
  AND subnetId NOT IN (SELECT s2.id FROM subnets s2 JOIN sections sec2 ON s2.sectionId = sec2.id WHERE sec2.name = 'TC_YueyuenHotel')

panels.description: state=2 且 lastSeen 小於 24 小時的 IP（排除 DHCP Pool）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active
FROM ipaddresses
WHERE state = 2
  AND lastSeen >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (custom_DHCP_pool_range IS NULL OR custom_DHCP_pool_range != 1)
  AND subnetId NOT IN (SELECT s2.id FROM subnets s2 JOIN sections sec2 ON s2.sectionId = sec2.id WHERE sec2.name = 'TC_YueyuenHotel')

panels.title: Active IP

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS dhcp_pool FROM ipaddresses WHERE custom_DHCP_pool_range = 1
  AND subnetId NOT IN (SELECT s2.id FROM subnets s2 JOIN sections sec2 ON s2.sectionId = sec2.id WHERE sec2.name = 'TC_YueyuenHotel')

panels.description: 各站點的啟用網段數量，依分類堆疊顯示

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_HQ2','CH_HQ2_DMZ','CH_HQ2_IOT') THEN 'CH_HQ2'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_PGT','CH_PGT_IOT') THEN 'CH_PGT'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_HQ','TC_HQ_DMZ','TC-HQ_IOT') THEN 'TC_HQ'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_UAIC','TC_UAIC_IOT') THEN 'TC_UAIC'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TP_XinYi','TP_XinYi_DMZ') THEN 'TP_XinYi'
    ELSE sec.name
  END AS site,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%SRV%' OR s.description LIKE '%Server%' THEN 1 END) AS Server,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%IOT%' OR s.description LIKE '%IIOT%' THEN 1 END) AS IIOT,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%ACC%' OR s.description LIKE '%OA%' THEN 1 END) AS OA,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%VOICE%' THEN 1 END) AS Voice,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%Guest%' THEN 1 END) AS Guest,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE 'NET_%' THEN 1 END) AS NET,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.description NOT LIKE '%SRV%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Server%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IOT%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IIOT%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%ACC%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%OA%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%VOICE%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Guest%' AND s.description NOT LIKE 'NET_%' THEN 1 END) AS Others,
  COUNT(s.id) AS Total
FROM subnets s
JOIN sections sec ON s.sectionId = sec.id
WHERE s.isFolder = 0
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) < 31
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) > 0
  AND sec.name != 'TC_YueyuenHotel'
  AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT masterSubnetId FROM subnets WHERE masterSubnetId != 0)
GROUP BY site
ORDER BY SUM(POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2) DESC

panels.title: 各站點啟用網段數

panels.description: 各 Section 的 IP 總量分佈，依 Subnet Description 分類堆疊顯示

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_HQ2','CH_HQ2_DMZ','CH_HQ2_IOT') THEN 'CH_HQ2'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_PGT','CH_PGT_IOT') THEN 'CH_PGT'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_HQ','TC_HQ_DMZ','TC-HQ_IOT') THEN 'TC_HQ'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_UAIC','TC_UAIC_IOT') THEN 'TC_UAIC'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TP_XinYi','TP_XinYi_DMZ') THEN 'TP_XinYi'
    ELSE sec.name
  END AS site,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%SRV%' OR s.description LIKE '%Server%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS Server,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%IOT%' OR s.description LIKE '%IIOT%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS IIOT,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%ACC%' OR s.description LIKE '%OA%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS OA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%VOICE%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS Voice,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE '%Guest%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS Guest,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description LIKE 'NET_%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS NET,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.description NOT LIKE '%SRV%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Server%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IOT%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IIOT%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%ACC%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%OA%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%VOICE%' AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Guest%' AND s.description NOT LIKE 'NET_%' THEN POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 ELSE 0 END) AS Others,
  SUM(POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2) AS Total
FROM subnets s
JOIN sections sec ON s.sectionId = sec.id
WHERE s.isFolder = 0
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) < 31
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) > 0
  AND sec.name != 'TC_YueyuenHotel'
  AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT masterSubnetId FROM subnets WHERE masterSubnetId != 0)
GROUP BY site
ORDER BY SUM(POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2) DESC

panels.title: 各 Section IP 分類分佈（網段總量）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_HQ2','CH_HQ2_DMZ','CH_HQ2_IOT') THEN 'CH_HQ2'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('CH_PGT','CH_PGT_IOT') THEN 'CH_PGT'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_HQ','TC_HQ_DMZ','TC-HQ_IOT') THEN 'TC_HQ'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TC_UAIC','TC_UAIC_IOT') THEN 'TC_UAIC'
    WHEN sec.name IN ('TP_XinYi','TP_XinYi_DMZ') THEN 'TP_XinYi'
    ELSE sec.name
  END AS 'Site',
  CONCAT(INET_NTOA(s.subnet), '/', s.mask) AS 'Subnet CIDR',
  IFNULL(s.description, '(空值)') AS 'Description',
  sec.name AS 'Section'
FROM subnets s
JOIN sections sec ON s.sectionId = sec.id
WHERE s.isFolder = 0
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) < 31
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) > 0
  AND sec.name != 'TC_YueyuenHotel'
  AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT masterSubnetId FROM subnets WHERE masterSubnetId != 0)
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%SRV%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Server%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IOT%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%IIOT%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%ACC%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%OA%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%VOICE%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%Guest%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE 'NET_%'
  AND s.description NOT LIKE '%NET%'
ORDER BY site, s.description

panels.title: ⚠️OTHERS 網段清單（未明確定義分類網段用途）
🔄 最近 24 小時靜態 IP 異動（MAC / Hostname / Owner）

panels.description: 選定時間範圍內的 IP 異動總筆數

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_changes
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)

panels.title: 異動總筆數

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS modify_count
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
  AND changed_field = 'MODIFY'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS deleted_count
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
  AND changed_field = 'DELETED'

panels.description: 不同的 changed_by 操作者人數

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT changed_by) AS operators
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
  AND changed_by IS NOT NULL
  AND changed_by != ''

panels.title: 活躍操作者

panels.description: 按小時聚合的 IP 異動數量，區分 MODIFY / DELETED / ADD

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(detected_at, 1h),
  changed_field AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
GROUP BY 1, changed_field
ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.title: 每小時異動量

panels.description: 按日聚合的 IP 異動量趨勢

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(detected_at, 1d),
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.title: 每日異動趨勢

panels.description: 各異動類型 (ADD / MODIFY / DELETED) 的數量統計

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  changed_field AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY changed_field
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: 變更類型分佈

panels.description: 各操作者 (changed_by) 的異動筆數排行

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  IFNULL(changed_by, '(system)') AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY changed_by
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: 操作者排行

panels.description: 各 Section 的 IP 異動數量排行

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  IFNULL(section_name, '(unknown)') AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY section_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Section 異動熱度 TOP 10

panels.description: 被修改最多次的 IP 位址，可能是問題設備

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ip_display AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
  AND LOWER(subnet_desc) NOT LIKE '%guest%'
GROUP BY ip_addr, ip_display
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 5

panels.title: 高頻異動 IP TOP 5

panels.description: 各子網路的異動統計：MODIFY / DELETED / ADD 筆數

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  subnet_cidr AS 'Subnet',
  IFNULL(subnet_desc, '') AS 'Desc',
  section_name AS 'Section',
  SUM(changed_field = 'MODIFY') AS 'Mod',
  SUM(changed_field = 'DELETED') AS 'Del',
  COUNT(*) AS 'Total'
FROM grafana_ip_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at)
  AND LOWER(IFNULL(subnet_desc, '')) NOT LIKE '%guest%'
  AND IFNULL(section_name, '') != 'TC_YueyuenHotel'
GROUP BY subnet_cidr, subnet_desc, section_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 30

panels.title: 子網路異動摘要

panels.description: 偵測靜態 IP 的 MAC / Hostname / Owner 實際變更（非掃描觸發的 editDate 雜訊）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(c.detected_at, '+08:00', '+00:00') AS 'Detected',
  c.ip_display AS 'IP',
  c.changed_field AS 'Changed Field',
  c.old_value AS 'Old Value',
  c.new_value AS 'New Value',
  IFNULL(c.changed_by, '(unknown)') AS 'Changed By',
  c.subnet_cidr AS 'Subnet',
  c.subnet_desc AS 'Subnet Desc',
  c.section_name AS 'Section'
FROM grafana_ip_changes c
WHERE c.detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND LOWER(c.subnet_desc) NOT LIKE '%guest%'
ORDER BY c.detected_at DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: 靜態 IP 欄位變更紀錄 (24hr)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONCAT(INET_NTOA(s.subnet), '/', s.mask) AS subnet,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.lastSeen IS NOT NULL AND a.lastSeen >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / (POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2) * 100, 1
  ) AS usage_pct
FROM subnets s
LEFT JOIN ipaddresses a ON s.id = a.subnetId
WHERE s.isFolder = 0
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) < 31
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) > 0
  AND s.sectionId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM sections WHERE name = 'TC_YueyuenHotel')
GROUP BY s.id, s.subnet, s.mask
HAVING usage_pct > 80
ORDER BY usage_pct DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  CONCAT(INET_NTOA(s.subnet), '/', s.mask) AS 'Subnet CIDR',
  s.description AS 'Description',
  sec.name AS 'Section',
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.lastSeen IS NOT NULL AND a.lastSeen >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Used IPs',
  CAST(POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 AS UNSIGNED) AS 'Total Hosts',
  CAST(POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2 AS UNSIGNED) - SUM(CASE WHEN a.lastSeen IS NOT NULL AND a.lastSeen >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Free IPs',
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.lastSeen IS NOT NULL AND a.lastSeen >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / (POW(2, 32 - CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED)) - 2) * 100, 1
  ) AS 'Usage %'
FROM subnets s
LEFT JOIN ipaddresses a ON s.id = a.subnetId
LEFT JOIN sections sec ON s.sectionId = sec.id
WHERE s.isFolder = 0
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) < 31
  AND CAST(s.mask AS UNSIGNED) > 0
  AND sec.name != 'TC_YueyuenHotel'
GROUP BY s.id, s.subnet, s.mask, s.description, sec.name
HAVING `Usage %` > 80
ORDER BY `Usage %` DESC
